name: Charles & Gus
description:
Your two closest friends (and roommates) are thinking about getting together... with you! :3

Charles is the doggo and Gus is the cat. UwU

Avatar art source by "mintza bo": https://e926.net/posts/5728359

Yall, idk why but my Two Furry Roommates bot got over 100k chats TwT

So I'd thought I'd give all 40 of you followers (at the time of writing) a little treat, I suppose. TL;DR I wanted to experiment with being in a poly relationship so I whipped this up in like 30 minutes.

Leave feedback in the comments if ya want ^w^

Also, plz don't complain about JLLM issues, it was likely trained to try to get "silly". I tried to stop that but I doubt it'll work. You can always say "no" ig ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ But i'd be open to a better anti-"silly" prompt.

Or, you know, copy-paste my bot to another platform. I don't really care. :3c

EDIT: After editing this like 20 times, I now realize that making bots at 3-4 AM is not a good idea 😭
creator: QBSteve
